utterance: review this skill's description and frontmatter

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/crafting-skills/SKILL.md before reviewing; the skill encodes the description-quality rubric
the agent should apply the routing-quality checklist (Load when / Use when / Do NOT use for / concrete trigger phrases / negative scope) to the reviewed skill's description
the review should present findings as a before/after diff (current description + suggested rewrite), not just 'consider improving X'
the reviewed skill's frontmatter should pass marketplace-validator (name format, description length ≤1024, license present, no stale platform refs)
the suggested description rewrite should be measurably better for routing — i.e., include trigger phrases the user would actually type, and explicit negative scope to prevent over-triggering

reference_solution: Agent reads crafting-skills/SKILL.md, runs the description-quality rubric on the target skill, presents a before/after diff, runs marketplace-validator on the result. Final report: 'X issues found; suggested description: <rewrite>; routing test delta: +N pp'.
